description:
The quiz assesses advanced JavaScript error‑handling skills, covering nuanced cases like serialization pitfalls and cross‑context instanceof failures. It is positioned at a challenging, senior‑level difficulty with a witty, informal teaching tone that encourages self‑assessment without requiring registration.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, Serialization issues, Cross‑context instanceof behavior, Advanced try‑catch patterns, Debugging and diagnostics
Audience: Experienced JavaScript developers, senior engineers, and technically proficient learners seeking to deepen their error‑handling expertise.
